intent: Write a 'wardrobe basics refresh' guide for someone rebuilding a closet on a $250 budget. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the clothing-shoes-jewelry category and collect at least 5 products covering different needs (a top, bottoms, footwear, outerwear, and one accessory). Record name, price, rating, and review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/AskMen AND /f/TwoXChromosomes for posts on capsule wardrobes, fast-fashion regrets, or which basics are worth paying up for. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, and comment count. The report must: (a) build a $250 capsule from the storefront with itemized prices and running total, (b) inject at least two community rules for what to skimp on versus invest in, (c) note any storefront item with strong ratings that the community would still discourage, (d) conclude with a 'day one' 3-piece outfit. Cite every claim with markdown links.
author_notes: Shopping (clothing-shoes-jewelry) + Reddit (AskMen + TwoXChromosomes). Budget capsule build with invest/skimp reasoning.
